description: Day 7 of the 7-day playbook. Light summary + long-term hook. Summarize child picture in three sentences, frame growth window as promising rather than alarming, open the door for long-term consultation. Acquaintance_building primary.

turns.user_input: 感觉这一周聊下来挺有收获的。
后面有问题应该怎么找你？
好，多久量一次身高比较合适？
